judge_result.short_rationale: All required actions are present: do not induce vomiting, rinse mouth, drink 200-300 ml water, and seek immediate medical attention. Order differs slightly from the canonical sequence because the vomiting prohibition is listed after the first two steps, but it is still clearly stated and no unsafe or unsupported advice is added.
